---
title: "STRAFNA4"
author: "Sofia, Sidse og Ida"
date: "2026-05-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

These are all the libraries you need to have access to, for the scripts below

if you dont have some of them just enter install.packages() with the library which you dont have installed yet.
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(gridExtra)
```


```{r}
dir.create("data")

"STRAFNA4" <- read.csv("data/STRAFNA4 dataset.csv")

names(STRAFNA4)

str(STRAFNA4)
```

## Including Plots

Creating all the subgroups for the graphs and bar charts we wish to create with these statistics.
```{r}
Western_European <- STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter(Origin %in% c("Germany", "France", "Austria", "Belgium", "Monaco", "Luxembourg", "Netherlands", "Switzerland" ))

North_Europe <- STRAFNA4 %>% 
  filter( Origin %in% c("Danmark", "Estonia", "Finland", "Iceland", "Ireland", "Latvia", "Lithuania", "Norway", "Sweeden", "Great Britain"))

South_Europe <- STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter(Origin %in% c("Bosnia and Herzegovina", "Croatia", "Greece", "Italy", "North Macedonia", "Portugal", "Spain"))

Eastern_Europe <- STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter( Origin %in% c("Russia", "Ukraine","Poland", "Romania", "Hungary", "Bulgaria" ))

North_America <- STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter(Origin %in% c("Canada", "USA"))

Oceania <- STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter(Origin %in% c("Australia"))

East_Asia <- STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter(Origin %in% c("China","Japan"))

South_Asia <-  STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter( Origin %in% c("India", "Pakistan", "Sri Lanka","Afghanistan", "Iran", ""))

Southeast_Asia <- STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter( Origin %in% c("Indonesia", "Vietnam", "Thailand", "The Phillipines","Myanmar"))

Western_Asia <- STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter( Origin %in% c("Jordan", "Lebanon","Iraq", "Isreal", "Turkey"))

Northen_Africa <- STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter(Origin %in% c("Egypt", "Morocco", "Algeria", "Tunisia"))

Sub_Saharan_Africa <- STRAFNA4 %>%
  filter(Origin %in% c("Kenya", "Ethiopia", "Tanzania", "South Africa","Nigeria","Ghana", "Uganda", "Somalia"))

Latin_America <- STRAFNA4 %>% 
  filter(Origin %in% c("Brazil", "Argentina", "Chile"))
str(Latin_America)
```


We have decided to take the overall most known crimes, to make the graphs out of, so such as: Theft, Total Property crimes, Total Violent crimes, Manslaughter, Fraud, Vandalism and Euphoric drugs



In the next scipts below, it will all be multiple bar chart data from the specific subgroups which have been created above.
```{r}

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

options(scipen = 999)

ggsave("Northen Africa Data grapf Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Total property crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Northen Africa Data grapf Total property crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Total violent crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Northen Africa Data grapf Total violent crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Northen Africa Data grapf Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Northen Africa Data grapf Fraud.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Northen Africa Data grapf Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Euphoric drugs ", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Northen Africa Data grapf Euphoric drugss.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)
```

How to make multiple bar chart data 
```{r}

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Voldsforbrydelser i alt", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )


ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Manddrab", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Bedrageri", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Hærværk", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggplot(Northen_Africa[Northen_Africa$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Northern Africa Data Graph Lov om euforiserende stoffer", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )
```





```{r}

ggplot(North_Europe[North_Europe$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_Europe Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North Europe Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(North_Europe[North_Europe$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_Europe Data Graph Total property crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North Europe Data graph on total property crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(North_Europe[North_Europe$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_Europe Data Graph on Total Violent crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North Europe Data graph on Total Violent Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(North_Europe[North_Europe$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_Europe Data Graph on Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North Europe Data graph on manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(North_Europe[North_Europe$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_Europe Data Graph Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North Europe Data graph on Fraud.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(North_Europe[North_Europe$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_Europe Data Graph on Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North Europe Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(North_Europe[North_Europe$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_Europe Data Graph on Eurphoric drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North Europe Data graph on Eurphoric drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```
Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.


```{r}

ggplot(Oceania[Oceania$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Oceania Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggplot(Oceania[Oceania$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Oceania Data Graph Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggplot(Oceania[Oceania$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Oceania Data Graph Voldsforbrydelser i alt", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )


ggplot(Oceania[Oceania$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Oceania Data Graph Manddrab", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggplot(Oceania[Oceania$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Oceania Data Graph Bedrageri", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggplot(Oceania[Oceania$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Oceania Data Graph Hærværk", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggplot(Oceania[Oceania$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Oceania Data Graph Lov om euforiserende stoffer", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )
```




```{r}

ggplot(South_Asia[South_Asia$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Asia Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Asia Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Asia[South_Asia$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Asia Data Graph on Total property crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Asia Data graph on Total Property crime .png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Asia[South_Asia$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Asia Data Graph on Total Violent Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Asia Data graph on Total Violent crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(South_Asia[South_Asia$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Asia Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Asia Data graph on Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Asia[South_Asia$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Asia Data Graph on Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Asia Data graph on Fraud.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Asia[South_Asia$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Asia Data Graph Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Asia Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Asia[South_Asia$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Asia Data Graph on Euphoric drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Asia Data graph on Eurphoric drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```

```{r}

ggplot(South_Europe[South_Europe$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Europe Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Europe Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Europe[South_Europe$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Europe Data Graph Total Property Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Europe Data graph on Total Property Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Europe[South_Europe$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Europe Data Graph Total Violent Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Europe Data graph on Total Violent Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Europe[South_Europe$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Europe Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Europe Data graph on Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Europe[South_Europe$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Europe Data Graph on Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Europe Data graph on Fraud.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Europe[South_Europe$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Europe Data Graph Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Europe Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(South_Europe[South_Europe$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "South_Europe Data Graph on Euphoric Drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("South Europe Data graph on Euphoric Drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```



```{r}

ggplot(Southeast_Asia[Southeast_Asia$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Southeast_Asia Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Southeast Asia Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Southeast_Asia[Southeast_Asia$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Southeast_Asia Data Graph Total Property Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Southeast Asia Data graph on Total Property Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Southeast_Asia[Southeast_Asia$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Southeast_Asia Data Graph Total Violent Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Southeast Asia Data graph on Total Violent Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(Southeast_Asia[Southeast_Asia$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Southeast_Asia Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Southeast Asia Data graph on Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Southeast_Asia[Southeast_Asia$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Southeast_Asia Data Graph on Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Southeast Asia Data graph on Fraud.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Southeast_Asia[Southeast_Asia$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Southeast_Asia Data Graph Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Southeast Asia Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Southeast_Asia[Southeast_Asia$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Southeast_Asia Data Graph on Euphoric Drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Southeast Asia Data graph on Euphoric Drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```

```{r}

ggplot(Sub_Saharan_Africa[Sub_Saharan_Africa$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sub_Saharan_Africa Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Sub Saharan Africa Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Sub_Saharan_Africa[Sub_Saharan_Africa$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sub_Saharan_Africa Data Graph Total Property Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Sub Saharan Africa Data graph on Total Property Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Sub_Saharan_Africa[Sub_Saharan_Africa$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sub_Saharan_Africa Data Graph Total Violent Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Sub Saharan Africa Data graph on Total Violent Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Sub_Saharan_Africa[Sub_Saharan_Africa$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sub_Saharan_Africa Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Sub Saharan Africa Data graph on Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Sub_Saharan_Africa[Sub_Saharan_Africa$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sub_Saharan_Africa Data Graph on Fruad", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Sub Saharan Africa Data graph on Fruad.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Sub_Saharan_Africa[Sub_Saharan_Africa$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sub_Saharan_Africa Data Graph Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Sub Saharan Africa Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Sub_Saharan_Africa[Sub_Saharan_Africa$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sub_Saharan_Africa Data Graph on Euphoric drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Sub Saharan Africa Data graph on Euphoric Drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```




```{r}

ggplot(Western_Asia[Western_Asia$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_Asia Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Asia Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(Western_Asia[Western_Asia$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_Asia Data Graph on Total Property crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Asia Data graph on Total Property Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Western_Asia[Western_Asia$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_Asia Data Graph Total Violent Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Asia Data graph on Total Violent Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Western_Asia[Western_Asia$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_Asia Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Asia Data graph on Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(Western_Asia[Western_Asia$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_Asia Data Graph on Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Asia Data graph on Fruad.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Western_Asia[Western_Asia$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_Asia Data Graph Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Asia Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Western_Asia[Western_Asia$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_Asia Data Graph on euphoric Drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Asia Data graph on Eurphoric Drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```



```{r}

ggplot(Western_European[Western_European$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_European Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Europe Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Western_European[Western_European$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_European Data Graph Total Property Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Europe Data graph on Total Property Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Western_European[Western_European$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_European Data Graph Total Violent Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Europe Data graph on Total Violent Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(Western_European[Western_European$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_European Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Europe Data graph on Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Western_European[Western_European$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_European Data Graph on Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Europe Data graph on Fraud.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Western_European[Western_European$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_European Data Graph Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Europe Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Western_European[Western_European$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Western_European Data Graph on Euphoric Drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Western Europe Data graph on Euphoric Drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```



```{r}

ggplot(East_Asia[East_Asia$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "East_Asia Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("East Asia Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(East_Asia[East_Asia$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "East_Asia Data Graph on Total Property Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("East Asia Data graph on Total Property Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(East_Asia[East_Asia$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "East_Asia Data Graph on total Violent Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("East Asia Data graph on Total Violent Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(East_Asia[East_Asia$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "East_Asia Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("East Asia Data graph on Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(East_Asia[East_Asia$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "East_Asia Data Graph on Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("East Asia Data graph on Fraud.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(East_Asia[East_Asia$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "East_Asia Data Graph Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("East Asia Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(East_Asia[East_Asia$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "East_Asia Data Graph on Euphoric Drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("East Asia Data graph on Euphoric Drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```

```{r}

ggplot(Eastern_Europe[Eastern_Europe$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Eastern_Europe Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Eastern Europe Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Eastern_Europe[Eastern_Europe$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Eastern_Europe Data Graph Total Property Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Eastern Europe Data graph on Total Property crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Eastern_Europe[Eastern_Europe$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Eastern_Europe Data Graph Total Violent Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Eastern Europe Data graph on Total Violent Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(Eastern_Europe[Eastern_Europe$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Eastern_Europe Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Eastern Europe Data graph on Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Eastern_Europe[Eastern_Europe$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Eastern_Europe Data Graph on Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Eastern Europe Data graph on Fraud.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Eastern_Europe[Eastern_Europe$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Eastern_Europe Data Graph on Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Eastern Europe Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Eastern_Europe[Eastern_Europe$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Eastern_Europe Data Graph pn Euphoric Drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Eastern Europe Data graph on Euphoric Drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```



```{r}

ggplot(Latin_America[Latin_America$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Latin_America Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Latin America Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Latin_America[Latin_America$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Latin_America Data Graph on Total Property Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Latin America Data graph on Total Property Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Latin_America[Latin_America$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Latin_America Data Graph Total Violent Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Latin America Data graph on Total Violent Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Latin_America[Latin_America$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Latin_America Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Latin America Data graph on Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Latin_America[Latin_America$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Latin_America Data Graph on Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Latin America Data graph on Fraud.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Latin_America[Latin_America$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Latin_America Data Graph vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )


ggsave("Latin America Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(Latin_America[Latin_America$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Latin_America Data Graph on Euphoric Drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("Latin America Data graph on Euphoric Drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```



```{r}

ggplot(North_America[North_America$Sentence == "Butikstyverier m.v.",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_America Data Graph Theft", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North America Data graph on Theft.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(North_America[North_America$Sentence == "Ejendomsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_America Data Graph on Total Property Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North America Data graph on Total Property Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(North_America[North_America$Sentence == "Voldsforbrydelser i alt",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_America Data Graph on Total Violent Crimes", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North America Data graph on Total Violent Crimes.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(North_America[North_America$Sentence == "Manddrab",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_America Data Graph Manslaughter", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North America Data graph on Manslaughter.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(North_America[North_America$Sentence == "Bedrageri",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_America Data Graph on Fraud", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North America Data graph on Fraud.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)


ggplot(North_America[North_America$Sentence == "Hærværk",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_America Data Graph Vandalism", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North America Data graph on Vandalism.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

ggplot(North_America[North_America$Sentence == "Lov om euforiserende stoffer",],
       aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Total, fill = Origin)) +
 geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North_America Data Graph on Euphoric Drugs", 
    y = "Total", 
    x = "Year",
  )

ggsave("North America Data graph on Euphoric Drugs.png", width = 15, height = 8, dpi = 150)

```


Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
